headline: MOH Q1 EPS Tops Estimates on Lower Medical Costs, Membership Declines
summary: Molina Healthcare beats Q1 EPS estimates, but profits plunge 61% as revenues dip, membership shrinks and premiums decline despite lower medical costs support.

headline: Molina controls costs in Q1 but future Medicaid spending in doubt
summary: The insurer beat analyst expectations for adjusted earnings in the first quarter. But steeper Medicaid membership losses than expected could saddle Molina with higher costs down the line.

raw.headline: Molina controls costs in Q1 but future Medicaid spending in doubt
raw.summary: The insurer beat analyst expectations for adjusted earnings in the first quarter. But steeper Medicaid membership losses than expected could saddle Molina with higher costs down the line.

headline: ELV Q1 Deep Dive: Operating Discipline and AI Integration Drive Margin Expansion
summary: Health insurance provider Elevance Health (NYSE:EVH) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2.9% year on year to $50.18 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $12.58 per share was 16.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Elevance Health Inc (ELV) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong EPS Growth and Raised Guidance
summary: Elevance Health Inc (ELV) surpasses expectations with robust earnings, increased guidance, and strategic advancements in AI and care delivery.

headline: Why Are agilon health (AGL) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of healthcare services company Agilon Health (NYSE:AGL) jumped 12.6% in the afternoon session after positive earnings reports from peers in the healthcare sector lifted investor sentiment for the industry.
